message:
feat: refactor wisp_reaper to use mol-dog-reaper molecule lifecycle (gt-nzkx)

Add dog_molecule.go helper that shells out to bd for molecule operations
(pour wisp, close/fail steps) with graceful degradation when bd is unavailable.

Refactor reapWisps() to:
- Pour mol-dog-reaper wisp at start of each patrol cycle
- Close scan/reap/purge/report steps as each phase completes
- Separate purge into its own loop (was interleaved with reap)
- Rename deleteClosedWispsInDB → purgeClosedWispsInDB to match formula naming

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
